## Reporting Instructions

**Before reporting, please confirm:**
- [ ] Search existing Issues to check if the same problem has already been reported
- [ ] Confirm the issue applies to the latest version
- [ ] Fill out all the fields below

---

<!-- Describe what actually happened -->

2. Click on '....'
3. Enter '....'
4. See error
